description: Coder Workflow hooks — invoke coder-orchestrator at SessionStart, ensure task tracking at Stop, and refresh codegraph on file changes via PostToolUse.

hooks.prompt: SessionStart hook: Invoke the coder-orchestrator skill via the Skill tool NOW, before any other response or action. This establishes workflow routing for the entire session. After coder-orchestrator, also invoke codegraph-orchestrator if the user's request involves codebase exploration.

hooks.command: echo 'File changed — ensure all discovered bugs are tracked as tasks. If codegraph exists, refresh: test -f .codegraph/graph.db && npx codegraph-mapper update 2>/dev/null || true'

echo 'Session stopping — verify: (1) all tasks marked completed, (2) all discovered bugs fixed, (3) verification commands passed. If codegraph exists, refresh: test -f .codegraph/graph.db && npx codegraph-mapper update 2>/dev/null || true'
